name: Crusty Baked Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and grate the potatoes on medium grater.
2. Add the eggs, flour, salt, and milk to a bowl.
3. Beat thoroughly until well mixed.
4. Dice the salt pork or bacon and fry in an iron frying pan until crisped and browned.
5. Leave the fat in the pan, remove the fried salt pork or bacon.
6. Pour the batter into the pan and scatter the fried salt pork or bacon on top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes.
